title: The Silent Visitor in My Baby Monitor
hook: Do not buy this smart baby monitor. Mine just recorded something that shouldn't exist.
setup: I installed it in the guest room for security. Every night at 3:14 AM, the motion sensor triggers.
escalation: The room is always empty. But the light patterns on the wall shift into perfect, glowing geometric shapes.
climax: These shapes never appear during the day. I zoomed in and realized the wall itself is warping.
ending: The pattern isn't a reflection; it's a map pointing to what's buried behind the drywall.
visualMoments: Close up of the sleek, glowing baby monitor unit.
Grainy night-vision footage showing an empty, dark bedroom.
Slow-motion zoom on the wall revealing glowing, shifting geometric lines.
Side-by-side comparison of day vs night wall texture.
A hand reaching out to touch the vibrating drywall.
